prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Mutant: Year Zero / The Ark inspired world map for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast polluted ocean Zone filled with many island groups and microcontinents: drowned skyscraper islands, Ark sanctuaries, mutant clan territories, ruined labs, reactor islands, wreck-strewn reefs, scavenger routes, dead radiation sectors, overgrown urban isles, toxic marsh chains, desert atolls, cold mountain islands and old-world military remnants.
Style/medium: high-resolution post-apocalyptic survival atlas, grey-green irradiated palette, weathered paper, gritty ink relief, hazard symbols, ruin markers, scavenged hand-drawn cartography, bleak Mutant: Year Zero tone.
Composition/framing: wide landscape world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large islands, tiny islets, crescent island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, broken bridge chains and fragmented coastlines with no grid-like spacing; include a compass and worn map border without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in shape and size, with broken concrete shores, curved bays, peninsulas, deltas, flooded suburbs, rusted ports, crater lakes and volcanic scars; show many climates and biomes across the archipelago including toxic forest, swamp, wasteland, desert, tundra, mountains, reclaimed ruins and barren dead zones.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, cheerful tropical colors, pirate treasure map cliche, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
